retry_reason: of_node_put is unconditional and void; there is no failure path, and retrying would constitute a double-put (use-after-free risk).
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases the device_node references held in each CPSW port's slave.port_np field. It is typically called during driver removal or error cleanup. After this function returns, the caller must not access the port_np pointers of any port, as the underlying nodes may have been freed. The function is unconditional and always consumes the references for all ports.
